title: viola × convicta
intro: Viola × convicta, also known as the hybrid viola, is a type of flowering plant that is a cross between Viola sororia and Viola lanceolata. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. In herbal preparations, Viola × convicta is often used to make teas, salves, and infusions that are said to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
